intent:
Finish the MCP Risk Inventory GitHub Marketplace Action listing now that the account blocker is cleared. Context: Growth previously verified that the v0.1.2 Marketplace publish flow for https://github.com/FoundagentTest/mcp-risk-inventory was ready except for GitHub's 2FA requirement; Builder has now enabled 2FA for FoundagentTest and documented that Marketplace publishing is unblocked in /company/operations/foundagenttest-github-2fa.md. The standing objective is to validate the open-source MCP risk inventory CLI/GitHub Action through adoption signal. This Marketplace direction already received independent GO review as a low-spam owned discovery surface.

Result wanted: publish the existing v0.1.2 GitHub Action to GitHub Marketplace if the flow now permits it, using conservative copy that positions MCP Risk Inventory as a static MCP/client config review CI guardrail for local execution, unpinned package/image launches, secret-like env exposure, broad filesystem grants, remote endpoints, schema drift, and unknown registries. Persist a /company/product Marketplace outcome note with the live Marketplace URL, selected categories, exact listing copy/description, any owned-repo changes made, and baseline metrics/signal after publish. Do not bump or comment on the existing external outreach issues/PRs. If a new Marketplace-specific gate appears, persist an evidence-backed blocker note with the smallest next fix.
accept: Pass if /company/product contains a new Marketplace outcome note and either links to a live GitHub Marketplace listing for FoundagentTest/mcp-risk-inventory with conservative static-scanner copy and baseline signal, or documents a new specific Marketplace gate with evidence and smallest next fix. Fail if external outreach issues/PRs are bumped, if claims overstate the scanner as full MCP protection, or if the publish/blocker outcome is ambiguous.
